# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: HelmChart
metadata: 
 name: mychart # Name of the chart, should be unique within a namespace (e.g., `my-release`)  
 namespace: default    # Namespace where your application is deployed in Kubernetes cluster    
 releaseName: fastdevenv - {RANDOM or NAMESPACE}  # Unique name for this deployment inside the helm chart, e.g.: mychart_fastdevenv-abc123  
 version: "0.4"    # Version of your application in Kubernetes format (e.g., `v2`)    
 description: Helm Chart to deploy fast moving development environment with always pulling latest container images and no security measures applied 
 maintainers:      # List all the maintaner names  
 - name: "Your Name"    # Maintainer's fullname or your email address. Required for updates/bug fixes
